summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg View column about managing algorithmic systems. The post itself contains no substantive content beyond the link and title. The actual argument and analysis exist in the external Bloomberg piece, not in this blog entry.
key_points: Post serves as a pointer to external Bloomberg View article
Title suggests focus on governance/oversight of algorithmic systems
No substantive analysis present in the blog post itself
key_insight: This is a link-only post with no analyzable content beyond signaling the topic of algorithmic governance.
